name: Invoice Overdue Reminder
description: Sends a payment reminder email when an invoice becomes overdue. Flags the invoice for manual finance review when it is 3 or more days past due.

config.subject: Payment Reminder — Invoice {{payload.invoiceNumber}} is overdue

config.promptTemplate: Flag invoice {{payload.invoiceNumber}} (ID: {{payload.invoiceId}}) for manual review. It is {{payload.daysOverdue}} day(s) overdue with an outstanding balance of {{payload.total}} {{payload.currency}} from customer {{payload.customerId}}. Due date was {{payload.dueAt}}. Add this to the overdue AR report and escalate if over 14 days.
